name: class_fusion
description: Try somewhat richer task-aware fusion now that throughput headroom is higher.
prompt_extra: Build on the current best boundary-supervision baseline. Make exactly one focused change in train.py. Target only lightweight or moderately richer class-aware/task-aware feature fusion for classification and parameter prediction. You may spend a little more compute than the baseline search space, but avoid heavy per-class towers or large auxiliary branches.
